items.title: The videogame market is as big as ever, with PC leading growth—global games revenue surpassed the $200 billion mark in 2025
items.summary: Market analyst Michiel Buijsman reckons GTA 6 will be 2026's "defining commercial catalyst."

items.title: The Evolution of Grand Theft Auto's Iconic Cover Art, Now Including GTA 6
items.summary: With Rockstar finally pulling back the curtain on the GTA 6 cover art, we thought we'd take a trip down memory lane and run through the history of the Grand Theft Auto franchise's iconic cover art.

items.title: Nearly 30 Years Later, Only One GTA Cover Actually Shows The Titular Crime
items.summary: The Grand Theft Auto series began in 1997, and every game in the series lets you commit the titular crime--sometimes stealing a parked vehicle, but often carjacking a driver in the middle of the street. But with the recent reveal of the Grand Theft Auto VI cover art , we realized something pretty remarkable: Only on…

items.title: 7 Burning Questions for the GTA 6 Pre-Order Launch
items.summary: GTA 6 is alive! Rockstar has confirmed that pre-orders launch on June 25, which means we’re just a week away from finally getting some meaningful answers on what to expect when the most anticipated video game of all time comes out this November.

items.title: Rockstar quietly gives us probably our best look at GTA 6's Vice City yet
items.summary: Along with today's cover art reveal, Rockstar has also quietly revealed its best visual overview so far of Grand Theft Auto 6 's crime-laiden metropolis, Vice City. Read more

items.title: GTA 6 pre-orders open next week, and to celebrate Rockstar has revealed its official cover art
items.summary: I honestly didn't think we'd get this far.

items.title: New GTA 6 Screenshot Shows Off A Beautiful, Bustling Nighttime Scene By The Water
items.summary: Rockstar Games has finally confirmed that GTA 6 preorders begin June 25 , and as part of the announcement, the game's website was updated with a new look at Vice City. A new image shows a nighttime scene in Vice City, with boats cruising through the water. Based on the ferris wheel in the background, this looks like…

items.title: Rockstar reveals the Grand Theft Auto 6 box art, which is quite nice I suppose, and pre-order dates for the game
items.summary: Rockstar Games has revealed the box art for Grand Theft Auto 6 , which looks a lot like you'd expect it to look, and it's revealed pre-order dates for the new game. Read more

items.title: As GTA Online readies for another large update, and GTA 6 approaches, Rockstar offers free upgrades to GTA 5 on PS5 and Xbox Series S/X
items.summary: In a surprise move, Grand Theft Auto developer Rockstar Games is giving players of GTA 5 on PS4 or Xbox One a free upgrade to GTA 5 on PS5 or Xbox Series X/S. Read more

items.title: GTA 6 Preorders Begin June 25, Cover Art Revealed; Take-Two Stock Jumps On The News
items.summary: At long last, preorders for GTA 6 will begin on June 25, Rockstar Games has announced. Additionally, the game's official cover art has been revealed. Crucially, Rockstar did not announce any pricing details for GTA 6, nor did the company list off the various editions of the game that will no doubt be available. Beho…

items.title: GTA 5 For PS5 And Xbox Series X|S Will Be Free For Last-Gen Owners This Week
items.summary: Ahead of GTA 6's release in November, Rockstar Games has announced that anyone who owns a digital copy of GTA 5 for PS4 or Xbox One will get a free upgrade to the PS5 or Xbox Series X|S version. The native versions for PS5 and Xbox Series X|S normally cost $40. They include better graphics and faster loading times,…

items.title: "Rockstar thought they could control the narrative. They're wrong" - tribunal rules against GTA 6 developer's request to remove union's blacklisting claims from ongoing legal dispute
items.summary: An employment tribunal has ruled against Rockstar Games ' request to remove blacklisting claims from the ongoing legal dispute over alleged union busting at the Grand Theft Auto 6 studio. Read more

items.title: "GTA is like the ogre" - It's an "odd" year to release a video game, says A Plague Tale studio Asobo
items.summary: A Plague Tale developer Asobo has called Grand Theft Auto 6 an "ogre" as far as its dominance over 2026's release schedule goes. It's the same year its Resonance: A Plague Tale Legacy game comes out, and it joins the crush in late August, a couple of months before GTA 6 crashes in. Read more

items.title: While other games try to avoid GTA 6, Phantom Blade Zero has changed its release date to move closer to it
items.summary: Wuxia-inspired action game Phantom Blade Zero is arguably one of the most anticipated games of 2026, but no game is as anticipated as Grand Theft Auto 6 , as the many calendar shuffles to avoid November have shown. So it was particularly surprising to see Phantom Blade Zero given a release date during June's State o…

items.title: As games pile into September to avoid GTA 6, Ghostrunner studio's promising Soulslike Valor Mortis is shifting its release to escape the rush
items.summary: It didn't take much of this year's Summer Game Fest to realise that, in racing to escape the orbit of GTA 6 , the games industry has created a new problem : a September 2026 so packed with releases that it's going to take some dedication - not to mention time and money - for players to get through even a fraction of…
